title:	Windows: Task Scheduler heartbeat pops up a cmd window on every run
state:	OPEN
author:	beyondchenlin
labels:	
comments:	0
assignees:	
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	17
--
## 问题描述

在 Windows 上执行 `memorytree-daemon install` 后，每次心跳触发（每 5 分钟）都会弹出一个黑色 cmd 窗口，持续约 1-2 秒后消失，严重干扰用户体验。

## 根本原因

`installSchtasks` 将 `/tr` 参数设为：

\`\`\`
node "C:\...\dist\cli.js" daemon run-once
\`\`\`

Windows 任务计划程序默认以交互式会话运行，直接启动 `node` 会创建一个可见的控制台窗口。

## 影响范围

- 平台：Windows only
- 所有通过 `memorytree-daemon install` 注册心跳的用户

## 修复方案

使用 `wscript.exe /B` + VBScript 包装器静默启动 node：

\`\`\`vbs
Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
WshShell.Run "node ""C:\...\cli.js"" daemon run-once", 0, False
\`\`\`

- `SW_HIDE (0)` 隐藏窗口
- `wscript.exe /B` 抑制 VBScript 错误弹窗
- VBScript 文件写入 UTF-16 LE BOM，确保中文用户名路径正确处理

修复 PR: #18
---
title:	feat: Add Doubao (豆包) TXT transcript import support
state:	OPEN
author:	beyondchenlin
labels:	
comments:	0
assignees:	
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	19
--
## Summary

Doubao (豆包, ByteDance's AI assistant) exports conversations as structured TXT files with a well-defined format. This issue tracks adding first-class support for importing these transcripts into MemoryTree.

## Doubao TXT Format

```
Title: 对话标题
URL: https://www.doubao.com/chat/38416801786598914
Platform: 豆包
Created: 2026-03-16 10:22:17
Messages: 28

User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]
用户消息内容...

AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]
AI 回复内容...
```

**Key properties:**
- Header block: `Title`, `URL` (last path segment → `session_id`), `Created` (→ `started_at`)
- Turn markers: `User: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS]` or `AI: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS]`
- Multi-line message bodies separated by blank lines
- No tool use events (pure chat)
- No `cwd` or `branch` metadata (external platform)

## Proposed Changes

1. **`src/types/transcript.ts`** — Add `'doubao'` to `Client` union type
2. **`src/transcript/parse.ts`** — Add `parseDoubaoTranscript()` function + update `inferClient()` and `parseTranscript()` dispatch
3. **`src/cli/cmd-import.ts`** — Add `forceRepo: boolean` field to `ImportOptions`
4. **`src/cli/main.ts`** — Add `--force-repo` flag for external imports (bypasses `transcriptMatchesRepo()` check since doubao has no `cwd`)

## CLI Usage

```bash
# Import a single doubao TXT file
memorytree import \
  --source doubao_chat_12345.txt \
  --client doubao \
  --root /path/to/repo \
  --force-repo

# Auto-detect client from filename prefix
memorytree import --source doubao_export.txt --root . --force-repo
```

## Why `--force-repo`

External platform transcripts (doubao, browser exports, etc.) have no `cwd` field, so `transcriptMatchesRepo()` returns `false` and the transcript gets written to the global archive instead of the repo's `Memory/` directory. The `--force-repo` flag overrides this check.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `parseDoubaoTranscript()` correctly parses header (title, session_id, started_at)
- [ ] Turn roles map correctly (`User` → `user`, `AI` → `assistant`)
- [ ] Multi-line message bodies are preserved
- [ ] `inferClient()` detects `doubao_` filename prefix and `/doubao/` path
- [ ] `--force-repo` flag forces writing to repo `Memory/` directory
- [ ] 10+ unit tests covering all edge cases

Fixes #17 — Windows 心跳每次触发都弹出 cmd 黑窗口。

- 改用 `wscript.exe /B` + VBScript 包装器静默启动 node，消除弹窗
- VBScript 写入 **UTF-16 LE BOM** 格式，修复中文用户名路径在 GBK 系统下乱码静默失败的问题
- `installSchtasks` 失败时同步清理已写入的 `.vbs` 文件，避免残留
- 修正注释中对 `wscript /B` 作用的错误描述

## 变更细节

| 变更 | 原因 |
|------|------|
| `/tr "node ..."` → `/tr "wscript.exe /B launcher.vbs"` | 直接运行 node 会弹控制台窗口 |
| `writeFileSync(vbs, content, 'utf-8')` → UTF-16 LE BOM | wscript.exe 在 GBK 系统上按 ANSI 读取，中文路径会乱码 |
| schtasks 失败时 `unlinkSync(vbsPath)` | 避免注册失败后遗留孤立 .vbs 文件 |
| `uninstallSchtasks` 同步删除 `.vbs` | install/uninstall 操作对称 |

## VBScript 内容示例

```vbs
Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
WshShell.Run "node ""C:\Users\ai\.codex\...\dist\cli.js"" daemon run-once", 0, False
```

## Test plan

- [ ] Windows 上 `memorytree-daemon install` 后等待一次心跳触发，确认无 cmd 弹窗
- [ ] 中文用户名路径下（如 `C:\Users\张三`）验证 VBScript 文件可被 wscript.exe 正确读取执行
- [ ] `memorytree-daemon uninstall` 后确认 `~/.memorytree/heartbeat-launcher.vbs` 已被删除
- [ ] 模拟 schtasks 注册失败，确认 `.vbs` 文件被清理","files":["src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts"],"title":"fix(daemon): suppress console window on Windows Task Scheduler"}

{"body":"## Summary

Closes #19

Adds first-class support for importing [Doubao (豆包)](https://www.doubao.com) TXT conversation exports into MemoryTree.

- **New parser** `parseDoubaoTranscript()` — handles the structured TXT format with header block + timestamped turn markers
- **`--force-repo` flag** — allows external transcripts (no `cwd`) to be written to the repo `Memory/` directory
- **13 new tests** — covers all parsing edge cases (multi-line bodies, URL→session_id, missing URL fallback, dedup, etc.)

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/types/transcript.ts` | Add `'doubao'` to `Client` union |
| `src/transcript/parse.ts` | Add `parseDoubaoTranscript()`, update `inferClient()` and dispatch |
| `src/cli/cmd-import.ts` | Add `forceRepo: boolean` to `ImportOptions`, wire into matching logic |
| `src/cli/main.ts` | Add `--force-repo` flag, update `--client` help text |
| `tests/transcript/parse.test.ts` | 10 tests for `parseDoubaoTranscript` + 3 for `inferClient — doubao` |

## Doubao TXT Format

```
Title: 对话标题
URL: https://www.doubao.com/chat/38416801786598914
Platform: 豆包
Created: 2026-03-16 10:22:17
Messages: 28

User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]
用户消息...

AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]
AI 回复...
```

## CLI Usage

```bash
# With explicit client
memorytree import --source doubao_export.txt --client doubao --root . --force-repo

# Auto-detected from filename prefix "doubao_"
memorytree import --source doubao_chat_12345.txt --root . --force-repo
```

## Test Plan

- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — parses header fields (title, session_id from URL, started_at from Created)
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — maps `User` → `user`, `AI` → `assistant`
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — multi-line AI response bodies preserved
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — per-turn timestamps extracted correctly
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — returns empty `tool_events`, `cwd`, `branch`
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — falls back to filename stem when URL is absent
- [x] `parseDoubaoTranscript` — deduplicates identical consecutive messages
- [x] `inferClient` — detects `doubao_` filename prefix
- [x] `inferClient` — detects `/doubao/` in path
- [x] `inferClient` — passes through explicit `'doubao'` client unchanged
- [x] All 627 tests passing (up from 617)","files":["src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts","src/cli/cmd-import.ts","src/cli/main.ts","src/transcript/parse.ts","src/types/transcript.ts","tests/transcript/parse.test.ts"],"title":"feat(parser): add Doubao (豆包) TXT transcript import + --force-repo flag"}

content.text:
两个 PR 的内容：

---

### PR #18 — fix(daemon): Windows 心跳弹窗修复

**解决的问题**：Windows 上 `memorytree-daemon install` 后，每 5 分钟心跳触发都会弹出一个黑色 cmd 窗口，影响体验。

**改动**（只改 1 个文件 `src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts`）：
- 任务计划程序不再直接调 `node`，改用 `wscript.exe /B` + VBScript 包装器静默启动，窗口彻底隐藏
- VBScript 文件用 **UTF-16 LE BOM** 编码写入，解决中文用户名路径（如 `C:\Users\张三`）在 GBK 系统下乱码的问题
- 注册失败时自动清理 `.vbs` 文件，卸载时也同步删除

---

### PR #20 — feat(parser): 豆包 TXT 对话导入 + --force-repo

**解决的问题**：支持导入字节跳动「豆包」AI 助手导出的 TXT 对话记录。

**改动**（5 个文件 + 1 个测试文件）：
- `src/types/transcript.ts` — Client 类型新增 `'doubao'`
- `src/transcript/parse.ts` — 新增 `parseDoubaoTranscript()` 解析器 + `inferClient()` 自动识别豆包文件
- `src/cli/cmd-import.ts` + `main.ts` — 新增 `--force-repo` 标志，让没有 `cwd` 的外部平台对话也能写入项目 `Memory/` 目录
- 13 个新测试，覆盖解析、自动识别、去重等场景

---

简单说：**#18 是 Windows 体验修复**（静默心跳），**#20 是新功能**（豆包导入）。要我帮你 review 代码或者合并吗？

diff --git a/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts b/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts
index 7779ee7..c20bd22 100644
--- a/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts
+++ b/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts
@@ -245,6 +245,31 @@ export function isLaunchdRegistered(): boolean {
 // Windows (Task Scheduler)
 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
+// Write a VBScript launcher that runs node silently (no console window).
+// wscript.exe /B runs in batch mode (suppresses script error popups).
+// VBScript Run(..., 0, False): 0 = SW_HIDE hides the window; False = fire-and-forget.
+// Written as UTF-16 LE with BOM so wscript.exe handles non-ASCII paths (e.g. Chinese
+// usernames) correctly on all Windows versions.
+function vbsLauncherPath(): string {
+  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'heartbeat-launcher.vbs')
+}
+
+function writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath: string): string {
+  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
+  mkdirSync(dirname(vbsPath), { recursive: true })
+  // Inside VBScript strings, double-quote is escaped as ""
+  const escaped = scriptPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
+  const content = [
+    'Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")',
+    `WshShell.Run "node ""${escaped}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`,
+  ].join('\r\n') + '\r\n'
+  // UTF-16 LE BOM: recognised by wscript.exe on all Windows versions and preserves
+  // non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese home directory paths) without corruption.
+  const buf = Buffer.concat([Buffer.from([0xff, 0xfe]), Buffer.from(content, 'utf16le')])
+  writeFileSync(vbsPath, buf)
+  return vbsPath
+}
+
 function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
   if (isSchtasksRegistered()) {
     process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in Task Scheduler. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
@@ -252,7 +277,8 @@ function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {

@@ -260,6 +286,8 @@ function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
       '/tr', trCommand, '/f',
     ])
   } catch {
+    // schtasks failed — remove the launcher file we just wrote to keep state clean
+    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }

+
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Doubao parser
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+//
+// Doubao TXT export format:
+//
+//   Title: 对话标题
+//   URL: https://www.doubao.com/chat/38416801786598914
+//   Platform: 豆包
+//   Created: 2026-03-16 10:22:17
+//   Messages: 28
+//
+//   User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]
+//   用户消息内容...
+//
+//   AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]
+//   AI 回复内容...
+//
+
+/** Matches a turn header: "User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]" or "AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]" */
+const DOUBAO_TURN_RE = /^(User|AI):\s*\[(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\]\s*$/
+
+export function parseDoubaoTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
+  const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
+  const lines = content.split('\n')
+
+  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
+  let title = stem
+  let sessionId = stem
+  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
+
+  // --- Parse header block (key: value lines before the first blank line) ---
+  let lineIndex = 0
+  for (; lineIndex < lines.length; lineIndex++) {
+    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+    if (line.trim() === '') break
+
+    const titleMatch = line.match(/^Title:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (titleMatch) {
+      title = (titleMatch[1] ?? '').trim() || title
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const urlMatch = line.match(/^URL:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (urlMatch) {
+      const url = (urlMatch[1] ?? '').trim()
+      // Derive session_id from the last path segment of the URL
+      const lastSegment = url.split('/').pop() ?? ''
+      if (lastSegment) sessionId = lastSegment
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const createdMatch = line.match(/^Created:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (createdMatch) {
+      // Convert "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" → "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"
+      const iso = (createdMatch[1] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
+      startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
+      continue
+    }
+  }
+
+  // Skip blank lines between header and first turn
+  while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+    lineIndex++
+  }
+
+  // --- Parse message turns ---
+  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
+
+  while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
+    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+    const match = line.match(DOUBAO_TURN_RE)
+
+    if (!match) {
+      lineIndex++
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const role: string = match[1] === 'User' ? 'user' : 'assistant'
+    const iso = (match[2] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
+    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
+    lineIndex++ // advance past turn header
+
+    // Skip blank line that follows the turn header
+    while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+      lineIndex++
+    }
+
+    // Collect body lines until next turn header or EOF
+    const bodyLines: string[] = []
+    while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
+      const bodyLine = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+      if (DOUBAO_TURN_RE.test(bodyLine)) break
+      bodyLines.push(bodyLine)
+      lineIndex++
+    }
+
+    // Trim trailing blank lines from body
+    while (bodyLines.length > 0 && (bodyLines[bodyLines.length - 1] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+      bodyLines.pop()
+    }
+
+    const text = bodyLines.join('\n').trim()
+    if (text) {
+      messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    client: 'doubao',
+    session_id: sessionId,
+    title,
+    started_at: startedAt,
+    cwd: '',
+    branch: '',
+    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
+    tool_events: [],
+    source_path: filePath,
+  }
+}

diff --git a/tests/transcript/parse.test.ts b/tests/transcript/parse.test.ts
index 70f86ba..753c06a 100644
--- a/tests/transcript/parse.test.ts
+++ b/tests/transcript/parse.test.ts
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ import {
   parseCodexTranscript,
   parseClaudeTranscript,
   parseGeminiTranscript,
+  parseDoubaoTranscript,
   isCodexSystemInjection,
 } from '../../src/transcript/parse.js'
 
@@ -839,3 +840,189 @@ describe('isCodexSystemInjection', () => {
     expect(isCodexSystemInjection('The AGENTS.md file contains project rules')).toBe(false)
   })
 })
+
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// parseDoubaoTranscript
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+/** Build a minimal valid Doubao TXT file content */
+function makeDoubaoTxt(overrides: {
+  title?: string
+  url?: string
+  created?: string
+  messages?: Array<{ role: 'User' | 'AI'; time: string; text: string }>
+}): string {
+  const title = overrides.title ?? '测试对话'
+  const url = overrides.url ?? 'https://www.doubao.com/chat/12345678901234567'
+  const created = overrides.created ?? '2026-03-16 10:22:17'
+  const messages = overrides.messages ?? [
+    { role: 'User', time: '2026-03-16 10:22:17', text: '你好' },
+    { role: 'AI', time: '2026-03-16 10:22:20', text: '你好！有什么可以帮你的？' },
+  ]
+
+  const header = [
+    `Title: ${title}`,
+    `URL: ${url}`,
+    `Platform: 豆包`,
+    `Created: ${created}`,
+    `Messages: ${messages.length}`,
+  ].join('\n')
+
+  const body = messages
+    .map(m => `${m.role}: [${m.time}]\n${m.text}`)
+    .join('\n\n')
+
+  return `${header}\n\n${body}\n`

+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+// Doubao parser
+// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+//
+// Doubao TXT export format:
+//
+//   Title: 对话标题
+//   URL: https://www.doubao.com/chat/38416801786598914
+//   Platform: 豆包
+//   Created: 2026-03-16 10:22:17
+//   Messages: 28
+//
+//   User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]
+//   用户消息内容...
+//
+//   AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]
+//   AI 回复内容...
+//
+
+/** Matches a turn header: "User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]" or "AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]" */
+const DOUBAO_TURN_RE = /^(User|AI):\s*\[(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\]\s*$/
+
+export function parseDoubaoTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
+  const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
+  const lines = content.split('\n')
+
+  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
+  let title = stem
+  let sessionId = stem
+  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
+
+  // --- Parse header block (key: value lines before the first blank line) ---
+  let lineIndex = 0
+  for (; lineIndex < lines.length; lineIndex++) {
+    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+    if (line.trim() === '') break
+
+    const titleMatch = line.match(/^Title:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (titleMatch) {
+      title = (titleMatch[1] ?? '').trim() || title
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const urlMatch = line.match(/^URL:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (urlMatch) {
+      const url = (urlMatch[1] ?? '').trim()
+      // Derive session_id from the last path segment of the URL
+      const lastSegment = url.split('/').pop() ?? ''
+      if (lastSegment) sessionId = lastSegment
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const createdMatch = line.match(/^Created:\s*(.+)$/)
+    if (createdMatch) {
+      // Convert "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" → "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"
+      const iso = (createdMatch[1] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
+      startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
+      continue
+    }
+  }
+
+  // Skip blank lines between header and first turn
+  while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+    lineIndex++
+  }
+
+  // --- Parse message turns ---
+  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
+
+  while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
+    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+    const match = line.match(DOUBAO_TURN_RE)
+
+    if (!match) {
+      lineIndex++
+      continue
+    }
+
+    const role: string = match[1] === 'User' ? 'user' : 'assistant'
+    const iso = (match[2] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
+    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
+    lineIndex++ // advance past turn header
+
+    // Skip blank line that follows the turn header
+    while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+      lineIndex++
+    }
+
+    // Collect body lines until next turn header or EOF
+    const bodyLines: string[] = []
+    while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
+      const bodyLine = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
+      if (DOUBAO_TURN_RE.test(bodyLine)) break
+      bodyLines.push(bodyLine)
+      lineIndex++
+    }
+
+    // Trim trailing blank lines from body
+    while (bodyLines.length > 0 && (bodyLines[bodyLines.length - 1] ?? '').trim() === '') {
+      bodyLines.pop()
+    }
+
+    const text = bodyLines.join('\n').trim()
+    if (text) {
+      messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    client: 'doubao',
+    session_id: sessionId,
+    title,
+    started_at: startedAt,
+    cwd: '',
+    branch: '',
+    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
+    tool_events: [],
+    source_path: filePath,
+  }
+}

    24→export async function cmdImport(options: ImportOptions): Promise<number> {
    25→  const root = resolve(options.root)
    26→  const source = resolve(options.source)
    27→
    28→  if (!existsSync(root)) {
    29→    process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
    30→    return 1
    31→  }

    36→
    37→  const client = inferClient(options.client, source)
    38→  const globalRoot = options.globalRoot ? resolve(options.globalRoot) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
    39→  const repoSlug = slugify(options.projectName.trim() || basename(root), 'project')
    40→
    41→  const parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
    42→  if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) {
    43→    process.stderr.write(`source transcript does not contain any importable messages or tool events: ${source}\n`)
    44→    return 1
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  const detectedProject = inferProjectSlug(parsed)
    48→  const matchesCurrentRepo = transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)
    49→
    50→  const result = await importTranscript(
    51→    parsed,
    52→    root,
    53→    globalRoot,
    54→    matchesCurrentRepo ? repoSlug : detectedProject,
    55→    matchesCurrentRepo ? options.rawUploadPermission : 'not-applicable',
    56→    matchesCurrentRepo,
    57→  )
    58→

    60→    ...result,

    62→    detected_project: detectedProject,
    63→  } as Record<string, unknown>

    71→}

好了，代码全部看完。下面是两个 PR 的 Review：

---

## PR #18 — fix(daemon): suppress console window on Windows

**评价：整体质量不错，方案正确。**

**优点：**
- VBScript + `wscript.exe /B` 方案是 Windows 静默启动的标准做法
- UTF-16 LE BOM 编码考虑了中文用户名路径，细节到位
- install 失败时清理 `.vbs`，uninstall 对称删除，生命周期管理干净
- 注释清晰，解释了 `SW_HIDE(0)` 和 `False` 的含义

**问题：**

1. **[MEDIUM] `node` 路径硬编码** — VBScript 里直接写 `node`，依赖 PATH 环境变量。Task Scheduler 运行时 PATH 可能和用户 shell 不一致，如果用户用 nvm/fnm 管理 Node，`node` 可能找不到。考虑用 `process.execPath` 写入完整的 node 路径：
   ```ts
   // 现在
   `WshShell.Run "node ""${escaped}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`
   // 建议
   const nodePath = process.execPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
   `WshShell.Run """${nodePath}"" ""${escaped}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`
   ```

2. **[LOW] 没有新增测试** — `writeVbsLauncher` 是纯函数（写文件 + 返回路径），可以加单元测试验证生成的 VBS 内容和编码是否正确。现有 `test_daemon.py` 已有 21 个测试覆盖 install/uninstall，TS 侧也应该补上。

3. **[LOW] `vbsLauncherPath` 未导出** — 如果后续测试或其他模块需要用到，建议 export。不过目前只内部使用，不急。

---

## PR #20 — feat(parser): Doubao TXT import + --force-repo

**评价：功能完整，测试充分，代码质量好。**

**优点：**
- Parser 逻辑清晰：header 解析 → 空行分隔 → turn 解析 → 去重，结构和其他 3 个 parser 一致
- 13 个测试覆盖了核心场景（header/roles/多行/时间戳/空 cwd/无 URL 回退/去重）
- `--force-repo` 实现简洁，一行 `options.forceRepo || transcriptMatchesRepo(...)` 搞定
- `inferClient` 的 doubao 检测放在 gemini 之后、throw 之前，顺序合理

**问题：**

1. **[HIGH] PR #20 包含了 PR #18 的全部改动** — diff 显示 `cmd-daemon.ts` 的 VBScript 改动也在 #20 里。两个 PR 的 `feat/doubao-parser` 分支似乎是基于 `fix/windows-hidden-heartbeat-window` 创建的，导致改动重叠。**如果先合 #20，#18 就变成空 diff；如果先合 #18，#20 合并时会有冲突或重复 commit。** 建议把 #20 rebase 到纯 `ts` 分支上，去掉 daemon 改动。

2. **[MEDIUM] `normalizeTimestamp` 时区假设** — `Created: 2026-03-16 10:22:17` 被转成 `2026-03-16T10:22:17` 后传入 `normalizeTimestamp`，最终变成 `...Z`（UTC）。但豆包导出的时间实际是用户本地时间（大概率 CST/UTC+8），直接标为 Z 会有 8 小时偏差。其他 parser 也有类似问题，可以后续统一处理，不 block。

3. **[LOW] `inferClient` 缺少 `\\doubao\\` Windows 路径检测** — 只检查了 `/doubao/`，但 Windows 路径用 `\`。不过看代码上面有 `toPosixPath`... 让我确认一下。

好，`toPosixPath` 在第 39 行已经做了路径标准化，所以 Windows `\` 路径会被转成 `/`，`/doubao/` 的检测是没问题的。**这个 LOW 问题取消。**

---

## 总结

| PR | 评级 | 主要问题 |
|----|------|----------|
| **#18** | 可合并，有 1 个 MEDIUM | `node` 路径硬编码，建议用 `process.execPath` |
| **#20** | 需要修复 1 个 HIGH | **包含了 #18 的全部 diff**，分支有依赖关系需 rebase 拆干净 |

**建议操作顺序**：
1. 先合并 #18（小改动，独立完整）
2. 然后把 #20 的 `feat/doubao-parser` rebase 到合并后的 `ts` 上，去掉重叠的 daemon 改动
3. 再合并 #20

   423→// Doubao parser

   426→// Doubao TXT export format:

   441→/** Matches a turn header: "User: [2026-03-16 10:22:17]" or "AI: [2026-03-16 15:43:17]" */
   442→const DOUBAO_TURN_RE = /^(User|AI):\s*\[(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\]\s*$/
   443→
   444→export function parseDoubaoTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
   445→  const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
   446→  const lines = content.split('\n')
   447→
   448→  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
   449→  let title = stem
   450→  let sessionId = stem
   451→  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
   452→
   453→  // --- Parse header block (key: value lines before the first blank line) ---
   454→  let lineIndex = 0
   455→  for (; lineIndex < lines.length; lineIndex++) {
   456→    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
   457→    if (line.trim() === '') break
   458→
   459→    const titleMatch = line.match(/^Title:\s*(.+)$/)
   460→    if (titleMatch) {
   461→      title = (titleMatch[1] ?? '').trim() || title
   462→      continue
   463→    }
   464→
   465→    const urlMatch = line.match(/^URL:\s*(.+)$/)
   466→    if (urlMatch) {
   467→      const url = (urlMatch[1] ?? '').trim()
   468→      // Derive session_id from the last path segment of the URL
   469→      const lastSegment = url.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   470→      if (lastSegment) sessionId = lastSegment
   471→      continue
   472→    }
   473→
   474→    const createdMatch = line.match(/^Created:\s*(.+)$/)
   475→    if (createdMatch) {
   476→      // Convert "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" → "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS"
   477→      const iso = (createdMatch[1] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
   478→      startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
   479→      continue
   480→    }
   481→  }
   482→
   483→  // Skip blank lines between header and first turn
   484→  while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
   485→    lineIndex++
   486→  }
   487→
   488→  // --- Parse message turns ---
   489→  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
   490→
   491→  while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
   492→    const line = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
   493→    const match = line.match(DOUBAO_TURN_RE)
   494→
   495→    if (!match) {
   496→      lineIndex++
   497→      continue
   498→    }
   499→
   500→    const role: string = match[1] === 'User' ? 'user' : 'assistant'
   501→    const iso = (match[2] ?? '').trim().replace(' ', 'T')
   502→    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(iso, startedAt)
   503→    lineIndex++ // advance past turn header
   504→
   505→    // Skip blank line that follows the turn header
   506→    while (lineIndex < lines.length && (lines[lineIndex] ?? '').trim() === '') {
   507→      lineIndex++
   508→    }
   509→
   510→    // Collect body lines until next turn header or EOF
   511→    const bodyLines: string[] = []
   512→    while (lineIndex < lines.length) {
   513→      const bodyLine = lines[lineIndex] ?? ''
   514→      if (DOUBAO_TURN_RE.test(bodyLine)) break
   515→      bodyLines.push(bodyLine)
   516→      lineIndex++
   517→    }
   518→
   519→    // Trim trailing blank lines from body
   520→    while (bodyLines.length > 0 && (bodyLines[bodyLines.length - 1] ?? '').trim() === '') {
   521→      bodyLines.pop()
   522→    }
   523→
   524→    const text = bodyLines.join('\n').trim()
   525→    if (text) {
   526→      messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
   527→    }
   528→  }
   529→
   530→  return {
   531→    client: 'doubao',
   532→    session_id: sessionId,
   533→    title,
   534→    started_at: startedAt,
   535→    cwd: '',
   536→    branch: '',
   537→    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
   538→    tool_events: [],
   539→    source_path: filePath,
   540→  }

Now I have a clear picture. Let me fix the three issues:

1. **MEDIUM: `node` hardcoded in VBS** — use `process.execPath` instead
2. **LOW: Add tests for `writeVbsLauncher`** — export it and add tests
3. **MEDIUM: Timezone** — `parseIsoTimestamp` at line 89-91 treats strings without timezone offset as UTC. The doubao timestamps are local time, so `2026-03-16T10:22:17` gets treated as UTC. The fix should be to not add `Z` suffix but instead acknowledge the timestamp as-is. 

The real problem is that `parseIsoTimestamp` assumes all timestamps without timezone info should be treated as UTC, but doubao's timestamps are actually local time while other parsers (codex, claude, gemini) either include timezone info or are genuinely UTC.

I could keep doubao's timestamps as local time without normalization to preserve accuracy, but that breaks the consistent Z-suffix format across all parsers. The pragmatic solution is to document this limitation in the doubao parser and potentially add a `--timezone` CLI option later, or detect that it's a Chinese service and assume CST (UTC+8) for the timestamps. But that's making an assumption.

The most pragmatic fix: Add a comment documenting the limitation, and keep the behavior. Or, we could simply not append Z and return the timestamp without timezone info, letting it be interpreted as local time. But that would break downstream code that expects ISO timestamps.

Let me think about this differently. The best fix that doesn't break things:
- Keep `normalizeTimestamp` as-is (treats no-tz as UTC)  
- Add a code comment in the doubao parser acknowledging the limitation
- This is consistent with how other parsers handle timestamps

Actually, I think a better approach is to just not force Z on it. We can return the timestamp without the Z suffix, like `2026-03-16T10:22:17` — this represents a "naive" timestamp without timezone. But `normalizeTimestamp` always outputs Z...

The simplest real fix: I could bypass `normalizeTimestamp` for doubao timestamps and format them as ISO strings without the Z suffix to represent local time. But then the test would fail and need updating too.

Actually, this might be overcomplicating things. Let me step back: I should fix the VBS node path issue since that's straightforward, add VBS tests, and for the timezone problem, just document the limitation with a comment rather than changing behavior across all parsers. So when I trace through what happens, `normalizeTimestamp` takes a local time string, treats it as UTC by appending `+00:00`, then formats it back with a Z suffix — preserving the numeric value but adding misleading UTC semantics. For doubao, I should skip that normalization and return the ISO string as-is without the Z. But I need to check if downstream functions like `timestampPartition` can handle timestamps without the Z suffix...

Checking timestamp parsing...

Actually, the cleanest approach is to format doubao timestamps as plain `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS` without any timezone indicator — that's semantically honest about what we know. The downstream code will still parse it fine, and string comparisons in deduplication will work consistently. Let me implement a helper for this in the doubao parser. I'll convert the doubao timestamps directly to ISO format without the Z suffix, so they're treated as naive datetimes rather than UTC. Now I'm ready to implement all three fixes.
